en_title: Bank Balances Rolled Back for Forza Horizon 6 Players Who Used Exploit to Amass a Billion Credits
cn_title: 《极限竞速：地平线6》封堵刷钱漏洞，余额回滚
subtitle: 10亿信用币清零
opus_summary: Playground Games确认封堵《极限竞速：地平线6》刷钱漏洞，涉事玩家余额回滚至1000万信用币上限，淘汰赛模式暂时关闭。此外调整了Horizon Play升级经验，削弱直线加速轮胎滥用，并新增道路探索百分比显示。

paragraphs.en: In response to an arcane but incredibly lucrative exploit discovered by Forza Horizon 6 players, Playground Games has confirmed that those who used the method to accumulate massive amounts of credits will have their balances rolled back.
paragraphs.cn: 《极限竞速：地平线6》的玩家发现了一个神秘但收益极其丰厚的漏洞，Playground Games已确认，将回滚那些利用该漏洞累积巨额积分的玩家余额。

paragraphs.en: “Players found participating in the exploit will have their accounts restored to a maximum of 10 million credits,” explains an FAQ on the matter published via the official Forza Support page. “As this error was on our side, no further action will be taken. We appreciate everyone’s understanding as we take steps to preserve the integrity of the in-game economy.”
paragraphs.cn: 在官方Forza支持页面发布的常见问题解答中解释道：「被发现参与该漏洞利用的玩家，其账户将被恢复至最多1000万积分。由于这是我们的失误，不会对玩家采取进一步措施。感谢大家的理解，我们将采取措施维护游戏内经济体系的完整性。」

paragraphs.en: The exploit, which involved placing a GMC Hummer EV in a specific, glitched state and subsequently entering matchmaking for The Eliminator mode was allowing players to rack up 999,999,999 credits in short order.
paragraphs.cn: 该漏洞的具体操作是：将一辆GMC Hummer EV置于某种特定的异常状态，随后进入「淘汰赛」模式的匹配，即可让玩家在短时间内刷出999,999,999积分。

paragraphs.en: The developer has temporarily disabled matchmaking for The Eliminator mode in Forza Horizon 6 while it develops a fix.
paragraphs.cn: 在开发修复程序期间，开发商已暂时禁用了《极限竞速：地平线6》中「淘汰赛」模式的匹配功能。

paragraphs.en: In the meantime, the latest update has brought with it a variety of helpful fixes, including tweaks to road discovery and levelling up in the online mode, Horizon Play.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，最新更新还带来了多项有用的修复，包括对道路探索和在线模式Horizon Play升级所需经验的调整。

paragraphs.en: A ‘Roads Driven’ percentage has now been added to the region overviews, which will allow you to more easily track down any pesky remaining roads you’re having trouble spotting on the map screen.
paragraphs.cn: 区域概览中现已添加「已驾驶路段」百分比，这将让你更容易地在屏幕地图上追踪那些难以发现的剩余道路。

paragraphs.en: Playground has also made adjustments to the amount of XP required to move between level 26 and 100 in Horizon Play. Hitting level 100 is attached to the Achievement ‘Maxed Out’, but some calculations were suggesting that getting to level 100 could take around 1000 hours of online play, which was not intended by the studio. Following the new update, players who have already reached level 32 will jump directly to level 100 and unlock the Achievement.
paragraphs.cn: Playground还调整了Horizon Play中从26级升至100级所需的经验值量。达到100级与成就「Maxed Out」挂钩，但此前有计算显示，升到100级可能需要约1000小时的线上游戏时间，这并非工作室的本意。在新更新之后，已达到32级的玩家将直接跳至100级并解锁该成就。

paragraphs.en: Playground has also addressed the issue of tunes with drag tyres being unrealistically advantageous for use outside of drag racing events.
paragraphs.cn: Playground还解决了直线加速轮胎（drag tyres）的调校在非直线加速赛事中异常有利的问题。

paragraphs.en: “This is not the expected behaviour or use case for drag tyres,” explains the team. “To alleviate this issue, we have made some adjustments that ensure drag tyres are no longer the optimal tyre choice outside of drag racing events.”
paragraphs.cn: 团队解释道：「这并不是直线加速轮胎应有的表现或用例。为缓解这一问题，我们做出了一些调整，确保直线加速轮胎不再是非直线加速赛事的最佳轮胎选择。」

paragraphs.en: “Additionally, we have retained the PI cost of drag tyres, meaning any tune that currently exists, for example, a tune that is A 700 will not change PI, but it will have significantly reduced cornering performance.
paragraphs.cn: 「此外，我们保留了直线加速轮胎的PI消耗，这意味着任何现有的调校，例如A 700级别的调校，其PI等级不会改变，但过弯性能会显著降低。」

paragraphs.en: “The team are aware that this means there are a lot of Leaderboard entries that will need to be removed. This will be an ongoing process as we work to identify and remove any lap times that were set using drag tyres prior to this patch.”
paragraphs.cn: 「团队意识到这意味着有大量排行榜记录需要移除。这将会是一个持续的过程，我们将识别并移除本次补丁前使用直线加速轮胎做出的任何单圈时间。」

paragraphs.en: The update notes can be viewed in full on the Forza Support page.
paragraphs.cn: 完整的更新说明可在《极限竞速》支持页面上查看。

paragraphs.en: Luke is a Senior Editor on the IGN reviews team. You can track him down on Bluesky @mrlukereilly to ask him things about stuff.
paragraphs.cn: Luke是IGN评测团队的高级编辑，你可以在Bluesky上通过 @mrlukereilly向他提问。
